title_en: Avocado Secrets: More Than Just Guac!
title_es: Secretos del Aguacate: ¡Más que solo Guacamole!
hook_en: Ever wondered why avocados are a superfood?
hook_es: ¿Te has preguntado por qué el aguacate es un superalimento?
key_message: Avocados are packed with over 20 vitamins and minerals, plus healthy fats. Discover how to enhance their nutrition even more!
visual_elements: demonstration of squeezing lime on avocado
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Avocado — Contains 20+ vitamins and minerals, healthy monounsaturated fats (Tip: Add a squeeze of lime to slow oxidation and boost vitamin C pairing)

title_es: Aguacate: El mejor amigo de tu corazón
hook_en: Did you know avocados love your heart?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que los aguacates aman a tu corazón?
key_message: Avocados contain healthy monounsaturated fats that support heart health. Learn to prep them for maximum benefit!
visual_elements: adding lime juice to sliced avocado
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Avocado — Contains 20+ vitamins and minerals, healthy monounsaturated fats (Tip: Add a squeeze of lime to slow oxidation and boost vitamin C pairing)
